content: L'Inghilterra era la favorita all'inizio della partita, poiché giocava in casa davanti a decine di migliaia di tifosi.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by carlosalberto (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:England was the favorite at the start of the game, as it was playing at home in front of tens of thousands of fans
